deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: Permanent erasure under India's DPDP Act. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.warning: This permanently deletes your account and study data.
deleteAccount.warningDetail: Your study progress, planner data, and profile will be deleted. Payment records may be retained for legal obligations. Community messages will be anonymized.
deleteAccount.otpHint: Enter the OTP sent to your phone, or use your account password if you set one.
deleteAccount.deletedBody: Your personal data has been removed or anonymized.

manageSubscription.pastDueAlert: Your last payment failed. Restore purchases or renew to keep Pro access.
manageSubscription.footerNote: All purchases are verified on our servers. The app never grants Pro access from client-side receipts alone.

manageSubscription.upToDateBody: No additional purchases were found to restore.
manageSubscription.cancelBodyAutoRenew: Auto-renew will stop. You keep access until the end of your current billing period.
manageSubscription.cancelBodyNoRenew: You will keep access until the end of your current period. No further charges will be made.
